textPlain:
I wanted to understand what the bare minimum of an operating system looks like.So I built one in Zig, keeping the whole thing under 1000 lines of code.It can:
→ Boot from GRUB
→ Manage memory
→ Schedule simple tasks
→ Output text to VGAThe point was not to make it feature-rich, but to show how much is possible with just a few hundred lines if you strip everything down to the essentials.
